motivation: Master spec W7/F1: MANDATORY safety before tier-2/3 data enters the fit - flat BT pollutes top-tier ratings via the connector graph. Scheme: pass-1 flat fit -> per-tier means (modal window-tier per team) -> pass-2 refit with tier-mean priors. Window-only, deterministic, no hand-set offsets.
disclosure: No prior peeks: this scheme has never been run on real data before this registration.
protocol: Dev screening via run_replay; select_nominee; holdout confirmation only on an explicit go from Will.
